name: No witnesses to my work slip, claim doomed in Saint George?

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my work slip, claim doomed in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.description: **No, photos, video, maintenance logs, your testimony suffice.** Patterns of hazards help.[2] Key factors: Request incident history. Expert reconstructs. Medical consistency proves. Insurers bluff—don't fold. Lawyer finds hidden evidence.
